title: content.synthesize-source task payload (v1)
description: Input for the content generator's content.synthesize-source skill — PRD part-4. Produces a complete synthetic 'legacy' source page (standalone HTML) at a public URL, plus groundTruth for eval reference. This is what closes the loop: generated source → migrate → eval with known-correct reference.

brief.description: Inline brief (from content.brief's artifact), or provide briefTaskId

briefTaskId.description: Reuse a prior content.brief task's artifact

topic.description: Shortcut: synthesize directly from a topic without a full brief

legacyStyle.description: How hostile the markup should be: clean=semantic, dated=tables+fonts, messy=inline styles + non-semantic soup
